name: Phicomm R1
author: Ava
description: Phicomm R1 native LED ring, voice-reactive, music RGB.
detail_description: Stock msgcenter voice and dormant lights; optional 4-mic directional wake; RGB music ring.

config.label: 4-Mic Array (DOA)
config.description: Bring up stock libUni4micHalJNI for directional wake LEDs. OFF by default — enable only on Phicomm R1 when you want DOA lights.

config.label: Voice LED Effects
config.description: Pipeline wake/loading lights. OFF = night silence for voice session LEDs.

config.label: Music RGB Breathing
config.description: RGB ring while Ava plays music. JNI preferred; msgcenter 519 fallback. Ducked during voice.

config.label: Dormant Light
config.description: Double-click top cover enters dormant (light 100); single-click exits.

config.label: Volume Ring LED (mod)
config.description: Usually handled by system AudioService on 官改 firmware. Enable only if volume ring LEDs are missing.

config.label: Top Key Sensor
config.description: Expose last top-cover gesture (single/double/triple/long) as a sensor.
